items.name: interactive-logs-chart
items.title: Interactive Logs Chart
items.description: An interactive chart visualizing system logs over time with data tooltips and active hover states.

mcp.description: Card features an API Traffic title with a performance description and time-range dropdown. It maps date, success, and failed logs to a dual-layered area chart with grid lines.

items.name: traffic-logs-chart
items.title: Traffic Logs Chart
items.description: A visual representation of web traffic volume and request spikes across different time periods.

mcp.description: Heatmap grid displays temporal intensity using color-coded status blocks. A legend-equipped header defines value scales, while axes map time periods to categories, visualizing activity density for varying system logs.

items.name: interactive-sales-chart
items.title: Interactive Sales Chart
items.description: A dynamic chart tracking revenue trends and performance with interactive cursor details and tooltips.

mcp.description: Stacked bar layout integrates a multi-metric header with action-driven dropdowns. Dual data streams map to vertical segments, while the horizontal summary row displays high-level values for temporal entity comparison.

items.name: channel-sales-chart
items.title: Channel Sales Chart
items.description: A circular chart illustrating revenue distribution across different marketing acquisition and sales channels.

mcp.description: Centered radial layout features a primary title and total value. Semicircle segments map to categories, while a three-column footer displays color-coded status indicators and individual values for diverse entity breakdowns.

items.name: live-logs-feed
items.title: Live Log Feed
items.description: A real-time activity stream displaying recent system events and errors in a chronological layout.

mcp.description: Terminal-style list features an action-integrated header with playback controls. Sequential data entries map timestamps, methods, and status indicators to color-coded rows, providing a scrolling feed for real-time entity events.

items.name: create-user-form
items.title: Create User Form
items.description: Structured account creation form for onboarding new team members, including profile details, role assignment, department selection, and secure password setup.

mcp.description: Administrative form layout for provisioning new user accounts. Multi column field groups organize identity, contact information, and organizational roles. Integrated validation handles password confirmation and required fields, while a header level switch toggles account activation during creation.

items.name: usage-logs-meter
items.title: Usage Logs Meter
items.description: A visual gauge displaying current system resource consumption against defined operational quota limits.

mcp.description: Resource-focused list features a badge-equipped header and interactive footer. Numerical ratios map to dynamic progress bars, while color-coded status indicators highlight critical thresholds for monitoring diverse system quotas.

items.name: source-sales-meter
items.title: Source Sales Meter
items.description: A list of progress bars ranking sales performance by acquisition source with percentage indicators.

mcp.description: List-based layout features a time-filtered header and rows with thematic icons. Value pairs map to prominent titles, while integrated horizontal progress bars visualize percentage distribution across diverse entities.

items.name: upgrade-sales-promo
items.title: Upgrade Sales Promo
items.description: An attention-grabbing card encouraging users to unlock premium analytics features and historical data access.

mcp.description: Centered promotional layout features an absolute-positioned status icon. Descriptive titles map to feature-list rows with success indicators, while the footer button provides a primary action for premium entity upgrades.

items.name: simple-logs-stat
items.title: Simple Log Stat
items.description: A minimal statistic card displaying total log counts with a clean, numerical layout.

mcp.description: Presents a vertical stack featuring a descriptive title above a large-format value. The footer maps directional status indicators and change values into a color-coded horizontal row.

items.name: rich-sales-stat
items.title: Rich Sales Stat
items.description: A detailed dashboard card highlighting total revenue with trend indicators and percentage growth.

mcp.description: Features a header with a prominent title and primary value paired with a trend badge. The footer maps a status label and subtext into a stacked vertical layout.

items.name: simple-logs-table
items.title: Simple Log Table
items.description: A clean data table listing system events with timestamp, severity, and message columns.

mcp.description: Tabular layout features an icon-led title and structured columns. Sequential data maps to badge-equipped status indicators and monospaced endpoint strings, providing a clear vertical audit trail for diverse entity logs.

items.name: product-sales-table
items.title: Product Sales Table
items.description: A comprehensive data list showing product performance, quantities sold, and total revenue generated.

mcp.description: Rich tabular layout features an action-integrated header and avatar-led rows. Visual status badges map to inventory states, while grouped text cells display performance metrics for multi-dimensional entity tracking.

items.name: simple-users-table
items.title: Users Table
items.description: Structured table layout for managing team members, showing profile details, roles, departments, account status, and recent activity.

mcp.description: Administrative table layout designed for user oversight. Avatar driven identity cells pair with role and department fields, while status badges highlight account states. Contextual dropdown actions enable profile edits, password resets, suspension, and removal directly from each row.

items.name: shadcn-day-fan
items.title: Shadcn Day
items.description: Use this component when highlighting special events, milestones, or important dates.

items.name: form-input
items.title: Form Input
items.description: A form input component with validation and error handling.

items.name: form-password
items.title: Form Password
items.description: A password input field with visibility toggle and validation.

items.name: form-select
items.title: Form Select
items.description: A select input field with options and validation.

items.name: form-switch
items.title: Form Switch
items.description: A switch input field with on/off state and validation.

items.name: form-textarea
items.title: Form Textarea
items.description: A textarea input field with validation and error handling.

items.name: form-checkbox
items.title: Form Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox input field with validation and error handling.

items.name: form-error
items.title: Form Error
items.description: A component for displaying form validation errors.
